summary: PASS. Retry 1 resolved both retry-0 failures: word count is 1,198 (under 1,500 ceiling), section count is exactly 7 with no extra h2, and the NXT-39594 V27 misclassification is corrected throughout. All 4 workflows, 4 pitfalls, and 5 citation spot-checks pass. Two non-blocking items for human editor before publish: (1) malformed closing tag on line 131 `<\code>` should be ``; (2) GTIN/UPC one-liner (M6, NXT-37815) was silently dropped — recommend adding to Related content given available word budget.
